mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_auth_refresh_session ( token_hash, account_id, identity_type, active_identity_id, tenant_id, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{tokenHash}, #{accountId}, #{identityType}, #{activeIdentityId}, #{tenantId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + (#{expiresInSeconds} * INTERVAL '1 second') )
mapper.select: UPDATE t_auth_refresh_session SET revoked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING account_id, identity_type, active_identity_id, tenant_id
